I need to run the primary and secondary endpoint analyses for a Phase III
randomized controlled trial of Drug X versus placebo in moderate-to-severe
rheumatoid arthritis.

The trial enrolled about 840 patients across 2 arms with a 1:1 ratio.
The SAP is frozen. The ITT population is the primary analysis set and the
per-protocol population is the sensitivity analysis set.

Primary endpoint: ACR20 response at Week 24 (binary), analyzed by logistic
regression stratified on baseline DAS28 and prior biologic use, reported
as an odds ratio with a 95% CI. Secondary endpoints: DAS28-CRP change from
baseline (continuous, MMRM), HAQ-DI change from baseline (continuous, MMRM),
with hierarchical multiplicity testing.

Sensitivity analyses: per-protocol ACR20, tipping-point missing-data
sensitivity, and subgroup forest plots for age, sex, prior biologic use.

Safety: AE summary tables with SAE and discontinuation breakdowns.

Data inputs are ADaM-shape CSVs: adsl.csv, adae.csv, adlb.csv.
